title: To'kustar Palladium/Alien Evo Addon
description: This Minecraft mod introduces Tokustar, a powerful alien from the Ben 10 universe. You can transform into Tokustar and unleash his immense strength and abilities, bringing his colossal power into your gameplay.
body:
Harness the power of Tokustar, a legendary alien of cosmic strength!
This addon brings Tokustar into your Minecraft world — transform into him and unleash devastating power and abilities worthy of a celestial being.

Survival Obtainability:

Tokustar isn’t easily earned.
Wait until your Omnitrix reaches its final stage of Self Destruction — when it begins flashing orange and white.
In that critical moment, quickly remove the core. You’ll notice the Omnitrix has changed... something new, something powerful — and the path to Tokustar begins.  

Commands:

/scoreboard players set @s AlienEvo.SelfDestruct 109000  wait a few seconds until it starts to continuesly blink and produce sounds, then remove omnitrix core.

/alienautoadd @s stretchakln:tokustar adds tokustar to the next available slot in playlist 2. 





Dependencies:mands 
Palladium, 
Geckolib, 
KubeJS, 
Architectury API, 
Alien Evolution v1.1.0, 
Pehkui, 
Rhino ,
Forge Version 47.4.0 ,

Coded by Gorrini,
Assets by Stretch
